title: Elbow Grease Concentrated Floor Cleaner | Makes Up To 50 Litres | Suitable for Tiles, Laminate & Vinyl Flooring (Lemon, 1L)
features: POWERFUL FLOOR CLEANER: This concentrated floor cleaner cuts through grease, grime, and dirt with ease, leaving surfaces sparkling clean. Perfect for homes with pets, kids, or high foot traffic, it restores shine and freshness in kitchens, hallways, and utility rooms.

MAKES UP TO 50 LITRES: Each 1L bottle makes up to 50 litres of cleaning solution, offering excellent value for money. Ideal for regular cleaning or bigger jobs like end-of-tenancy deep cleans, it helps reduce the need for constant top-ups in your cleaning cupboard.

TWO REFRESHING FRAGRANCES: Choose from uplifting Lemon Fresh or zesty Orange Splash – both designed to leave a long-lasting scent that makes any room feel freshly cleaned. Use after cooking, muddy walks, or everyday spills to instantly refresh the space.

MULTI-SURFACE SUITABILITY: Lemon Fresh is perfect for tiles, vinyl and laminate floors, while Orange Splash is ideal for wooden floors, vinyl and laminate. A flexible option for any household, it adapts to a range of floor surfaces with powerful cleaning results.

EASY TO USE FORMULA: Simply dilute 2 caps into 5 litres of water and mop away. There’s no need for scrubbing or rinsing – just a few swipes and floors are left gleaming. A quick, fuss-free way to stay on top of everyday mess.

GENTLE BUT EFFECTIVE: This solution is tough on dirt but kind to surfaces, making it suitable for frequent use. Whether it’s sticky spills in the dining room or muddy pawprints in the hallway, it leaves floors looking spotless without damaging the finish.

A MUST-HAVE CLEANING PRODUCT: This product fits seamlessly into any cleaning routine, whether used alongside a mop or sponge. It complements your existing cleaning tools and boosts results in every room.

PERFECT FOR FAMILY HOMES: From kitchen floors after dinner to the bathroom after bath time, this floor cleaner tackles daily mess without hassle. Its concentrated formula means you can rely on it for everything from small spills to big cleaning jobs.

A VERSATILE CLEANING HERO: More than just a floor cleaner, it acts as a go-to tile cleaner, laminate floor cleaner and surface cleaner. Whether mopping up after a party or cleaning a quiet corner, it delivers a satisfying finish every time.

A RELIABLE ALTERNATIVE TO FLASH: Looking for something different to your usual cleaning brand? Elbow Grease is trusted by households across the UK and offers a power-packed alternative to other brands – with amazing results and fresh, lasting fragrance.
description: Product Description Keep floors looking their best with Elbow Grease Concentrated Floor Cleaner – the only floor cleaner you’ll ever need for sparkling surfaces and lasting freshness. This powerful formula is designed to cut through dirt, grease, and grime with ease, delivering a deep, streak-free clean with every mop. With two fresh and uplifting fragrances – Lemon Fresh and Orange Splash – this cleaner not only revitalises floors but leaves rooms smelling beautifully clean. Each 1L bottle makes up to 50 litres of ready-to-use cleaner, offering outstanding value and long-lasting performance. Lemon Fresh is ideal for use on tiles, laminate and vinyl, while Orange Splash is specially developed for wooden floors, as well as being suitable for vinyl and laminate. Whether you're cleaning the kitchen floor after a busy day, freshening up a hallway, or tackling messy footprints in the living room, this versatile solution powers through everyday dirt and spills. Simply dilute 2 caps in 5 litres of water, and mop for brilliant results. A must-have addition to any home’s cleaning supplies. Ingredients Contains amongst other ingredients: <5% Non Ionic Surfactants, Parfum, Limonene, Methylchloroisothiazolinone, Methylisothiazolinone.
